title: Saint-Léger-les-Mélèzes
summary: Saint-Léger-les-Mélèzes (French pronunciation: [sɛ̃ leʒe le melɛz]; Vivaro-Alpine: Sant Lagier) is a commune in the Hautes-Alpes department in southeastern France.
text:
Saint-Léger-les-Mélèzes (French pronunciation: [sɛ̃ leʒe le melɛz]; Vivaro-Alpine: Sant Lagier) is a commune in the Hautes-Alpes department in southeastern France.
